CORRECT.model_response:
The deepest lake in North America is **Great Slave Lake** in the Northwest Territories of Canada.

CORRECT.question: What is the northernmost point of the African continent?
CORRECT.model_response:
The northernmost point of the African continent is **Ras ben Sakka** (also known as Cape Ben Sakka), located in Tunisia at approximately **37°21' N latitude**.

This point is slightly farther north than the more commonly cited Cape Angela (Ras Angela), which is also in Tunisia and was long considered the northernmost point until Ras ben Sakka's position was confirmed.
